---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header"><h1>Reading List</h1></div>
<p style="margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text-muted);">Papers I've read recently — collaborator work, methodological references, and things worth knowing about.</p>
<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">
<div id="reading-filter-bar" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.4rem;margin-bottom:1.1rem;"></div>
<div id="reading-list"><p class="pub-loading">Loading…</p></div>
<script>
(async function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('reading-list');
  const filterBar = document.getElementById('reading-filter-bar');
  let entries = [];
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/data/reading.json');
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
    entries = await res.json();
  } catch {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Could not load reading list.</p>';
    return;
  }
  if (!entries.length) { container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">Nothing here yet.</p>'; return; }
  const allTags = [...new Set(entries.flatMap(e => e.tags || []))];
  let activeTags = new Set();
  function getNavy()   { return getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--navy').trim() || '#1e3a2a'; }
  function getAccent() { return (window.CCM_COLORS && window.CCM_COLORS.accent) || '#c05a4a'; }
  function pillStyle(active) {
    const navy = getNavy();
    return active
      ? `background:${navy};color:#fff;border:1.5px solid ${navy};border-radius:999px;padding:0.25rem 0.85rem;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.15s;`
      : `background:transparent;color:${navy};border:1.5px solid ${navy};border-radius:999px;padding:0.25rem 0.85rem;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all 0.15s;opacity:0.65;`;
  }
  function renderFilterBar() {
    if (!allTags.length) return;
    filterBar.innerHTML = allTags.map(tag => `<button data-tag="${tag}" style="${pillStyle(activeTags.has(tag))}">${tag}</button>`).join('');
    filterBar.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => {
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const tag = btn.dataset.tag;
        if (activeTags.has(tag)) activeTags.delete(tag); else activeTags.add(tag);
        renderFilterBar(); renderList();
      });
    });
  }
  const metaCache = {};
  async function fetchMeta(doi) {
    if (metaCache[doi] !== undefined) return metaCache[doi];
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`https://api.crossref.org/works/${encodeURIComponent(doi)}?mailto=connorconkeymorrison@gmail.com`);
      if (!res.ok) { metaCache[doi] = null; return null; }
      const data = await res.json(); const w = data.message;
      const authors = (w.author||[]).slice(0,5).map(a => { const last=a.family||''; const init=a.given?a.given[0]+'.':''; return `${last}, ${init}`.trim().replace(/,$/,''); }).join(', ') + ((w.author||[]).length > 5 ? ', et al.' : '');
      metaCache[doi] = { title: w.title?.[0]||'Untitled', journal: w['container-title']?.[0]||'', year: w.published?.['date-parts']?.[0]?.[0]||'', authors, url: `https://doi.org/${doi}` };
    } catch { metaCache[doi] = null; }
    return metaCache[doi];
  }
  function getBookSvg() {
    const c = getAccent();
    return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.75" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2z"/><path d="M22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z"/></svg>`;
  }
  function tagPill(tag) {
    const accent = getAccent();
    return `<span style="display:inline-block;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;color:${accent};background:color-mix(in srgb,${accent} 12%,transparent);border-radius:999px;padding:0.1rem 0.55rem;margin-right:0.3rem;margin-top:0.35rem;">${tag}</span>`;
  }
  function renderCard(meta, entry) {
    const { doi, note, tags = [] } = entry;
    const url = meta ? meta.url : `https://doi.org/${doi}`;
    const title = meta ? meta.title : doi;
    const byline = meta ? [meta.authors, meta.year, meta.journal].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') : '';
    const tagHtml = tags.map(tagPill).join('');
    return `<div class="pub-entry-block"><div class="pub-favicon-fallback">${getBookSvg()}</div><div class="pub-entry-text"><a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="pub-title-link">${title}</a>${byline?`<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.2rem;font-style:italic;">${byline}</div>`:''} ${tagHtml?`<div style="margin-top:0.1rem;">${tagHtml}</div>`:''} ${note?`<div style="font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:0.4rem;line-height:1.6;">${note}</div>`:''}</div></div>`;
  }
  async function renderList() {
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="pub-loading">Loading…</p>';
    const filtered = activeTags.size === 0 ? entries : entries.filter(e => (e.tags||[]).some(t => activeTags.has(t)));
    if (!filtered.length) { container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;">No entries for this filter.</p>'; return; }
    const metas = await Promise.all(filtered.map(e => fetchMeta(e.doi)));
    container.innerHTML = filtered.map((e, i) => renderCard(metas[i], e)).join('');
  }
  renderFilterBar();
  renderList();
})();
</script>
```
